items.title: Inside the Australian hotel where Iranian footballers escaped to claim asylum
items.dek: Activists played a key role in making contact with the women as they tried to dodge their minders.

items.title: Katy Perry loses trademark case against Australian designer Katie Perry
items.dek: The US singer lost the case in 2023 and later won on appeal, but now judges have ruled against her.
items.body: The US singer lost the case in 2023 and later won on appeal, but now judges have ruled against her.
